summary: Attribution Persistence + Collection Unification Pack testing completed successfully. All 16 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend attribution bootstrap verified - localStorage persistence, URL param capture working. Admin quotes/invoices pages functional.

user_registration_with_affiliate_code.notes: Registration captures affiliate_code from payload, stores attribution fields, returns user with referral_code

quote_creation_with_attribution.notes: Quotes created in quotes_v2 collection with affiliate_code, campaign_id, campaign_name, attribution_captured_at

quote_listing_collection_unification.notes: Lists from quotes_v2 with fallback to legacy quotes collection. Status filtering works.

quote_to_invoice_attribution_preservatio.notes: Invoice inherits affiliate_code, campaign_id, campaign_name, attribution_captured_at from source quote. Uses invoices_v2 collection.

attribution_capture_service.notes: All attribution helper functions working correctly

frontend_attribution_helper.notes: localStorage persistence verified. URL params (affiliate, ref, partner) captured.

app_js_attribution_bootstrap.notes: bootstrapAffiliateAttribution called on app load via useEffect

auth_js_affiliate_code_on_register.notes: Uses getStoredAffiliateCode() on registration, sends affiliate_code in register payload

admin_quotes_page.notes: Displays quotes with QTN- numbers, status badges, PDF/Send/Convert actions

admin_invoices_page.notes: Displays invoices with INV- numbers, status dropdown, PDF/Send actions

critical_code_review_comments: attribution_capture_service.py: Clean implementation with proper hydration from affiliates collection
quote_routes.py: Correctly uses quotes_v2 collection with attribution block
quote_models.py: QuoteCreate includes all attribution fields (affiliate_code, campaign_id, campaign_name, etc.)
App.js: bootstrapAffiliateAttribution properly called on mount
Auth.js: getStoredAffiliateCode used in handleRegister to pass affiliate_code

success_rate.frontend: 100% (attribution bootstrap, auth page, admin panel verified)

seed_data_creation: Test users and quotes created with TEST_ prefix for attribution verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attribution Persistence + Collection Unification Pack fully tested. User registration captures affiliate_code. Quote creation uses quotes_v2 collection with full attribution fields. Quote→Invoice conversion preserves attribution. Frontend App.js bootstraps attribution from URL params into localStorage. Auth.js sends affiliate_code on registration. Admin quotes page shows quotes with status badges and PDF/Send/Convert actions.

collection_unification_verified.invoices: invoices_v2 for new invoices from quote conversion
